headline: Good morning, Josh. Viral Engine has 7 tasks in queue. 1 require attention. EP006 needs fixing and Season 3 is ready to render.

content.label: Fix EP006 Pearl Harbor — Run render_ep006.bat
content.details: EP006 is broken. Josh must run render_ep006.bat from C:\Users\jjard\claude\video-bot-pipeline\ to re-render it from scratch.

content.label: Project Manager — Head of Production Operations
Research Lead — Director of Research & Intelligence
Engineering Lead — Head of Production Technology

Publishing Director — Head of Content Publishing & Distribution

YouTube AdSense — Gods & Glory
content.details: Historical documentary niche has one of the highest CPMs on YouTube. Priority: publish S3 episodes.

content.label: YouTube AdSense — Machine Learning
content.details: AI content has the highest CPM on YouTube right now. EP001 launch is high priority.

content.label: Channel Memberships
content.details: Set up channel membership tiers: $2.99, $4.99, $9.99/month. Perks: early access, behind-scenes content.

content.label: History Sponsor Categories
content.details: Gods & Glory audience is prime for Audible, NordVPN, MasterClass, Skillshare sponsorships.

content.label: AI & Automation in 2025-2026
content.details: Every major AI announcement is driving search traffic. GPT-5, Gemini Ultra, Claude 4 — all high-search topics right now.

content.label: Ancient Greece content boom
content.details: Mythology content is surging on YouTube. Little Olympus is perfectly positioned. Launch EP001 now.

content.label: Historical battles anniversary content
content.value: UPCOMING: Research Lead should check 2026 battle anniversaries
content.details: Major battle anniversaries drive search traffic spikes. Research upcoming anniversaries to plan content.

content.label: Gods & Glory: "The Battle That Saved Western Civilization" (Tours 732 AD)
content.value: Script exists: EP017 Battle of Tours
content.details: Already scripted in S3. Render and publish. High-virality topic.

content.label: Machine Learning: "The AI That Learned to Lie" (Hallucination explained)
content.value: New episode concept — high search volume
content.details: AI hallucination is a trending topic. Can be explained accessibly for the ML channel.

content.label: Little Olympus: "The Day Zeus Lost a Bet" (Prometheus story)
content.details: Prometheus stealing fire is a universal story with high search interest. Perfect for LO.

content.label: Merch: Gods & Glory clothing line
content.details: Redbubble or Printful integration. Zero upfront cost. 20-30% margin per sale.

content.label: Courses: "How I Make AI Documentaries" (Machine Learning)
content.details: The audience interested in AI will pay $49-199 for a course on AI video production. Sell on Gumroad.

content.label: eBook: "100 Greatest Battles in History" (Gods & Glory)
content.details: AI-written, AI-illustrated ebook. Sell on Gumroad for $9.99. Low effort, recurring revenue.

content.label: Empire OS Server
content.details: Run START_EMPIRE_OS.bat to start the server. Should auto-start with LAUNCH_EMPIRE.bat.

content.label: EP006 Pearl Harbor
content.details: Run render_ep006.bat from C:\Users\jjard\claude\video-bot-pipeline\ to fix.

content.label: Season 3 Render Status
content.details: All 14 S3 scripts are written. Run render_season3.bat to produce all episodes.

content.label: Council Bot System
content.value: Should be running — verify with council_run.bat
content.details: 9 bots monitoring pipeline. Run council_run.bat to start if not running.

content.details: http://localhost:3001/video-factory/ — ready for first project.

content.label: Autonomous Executive
content.details: http://localhost:3001/executive/ — Daily briefings enabled.

content.label: No completions in the last 7 days
content.value: The queue was just initialized — tasks are pending.

content.label: ① Run COMMIT_SERVER.ps1
content.value: Deploy Video Factory + Autonomous Executive to empire-os
content.details: Right-click COMMIT_SERVER.ps1 → Run with PowerShell. Copies all new modules to empire-os and pushes to GitHub.

content.label: ② Start Empire OS
content.details: Double-click LAUNCH_EMPIRE.bat to kill old processes and start Empire OS + CrossPost.

content.label: ③ Fix EP006 Pearl Harbor
content.details: Broken episode. Run render_ep006.bat from video-bot-pipeline folder.

content.label: ④ Render Season 3
content.details: 14 complete scripts waiting to become episodes. Run overnight.

content.label: ⑤ Create first Video Factory project
content.value: Test the pipeline with ML EP001 or LO EP001
content.details: POST /video-factory/projects with channel: machine-learning, mode: educational-courses
